title: hieracium laevigatum subsp. perangustum
intro: Hieracium laevigatum subsp. perangustum, also known as a sub-species of the common hawkweed plant, is a type of flowering plant in the dandelion family. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Hieracium laevigatum subsp. perangustum include its potential to aid in the treatment of various ailments such as wounds, skin irritations, and respiratory issues, due to its ability to reduce inflammation and fight off infections. The plant can be used in herbal preparations such as infusions, tinctures, and salves, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
